title: A Trip of Sharing
content:
On February 17, 2004 -- I sent out the following message to some of my closed friends.

bq.. Hello All,

This is a preliminary confirmation for the "A Trip of Sharing" to Foundation for Disabled Children (Pakkred). The trip will be in the 'afternoon (from 2pm) of Saturday, February 28, 2004'.

For those of you who can't join us this time, don't worry. There'll certainly be another trip. :)

Thanks,
SW

p.

Today, we went to the  "Home for Mentally and Physically Handicapped Babie":http://www.thai.net/fuengfa/  (the official name) @ Pakkred, Nonthaburi. I'll not say much but let the photos tell the story.  %(me)Let's use Thai for the captions ...%  (10 photos @ ~30-35KB each)

!/gallery/20040228/pk_01.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_03.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_04.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_05.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_06.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_07.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_08.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_09.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_02.jpg!

!/gallery/20040228/pk_10.jpg!


Thanks to everyone who unselfishly took part in this trip. Thanks to god who made us what we are today -- not 100% perfect but more than enough for us to survive on our own. And most importantly, thanks to my dear daddy who kept telling me  **"when you have enough, you share."**

... more  "photos":http://www.iningz.net/diary/archives/2004/02/28-133.php
